operatingRule: Do not make production-risk changes without explicit owner approval, and do not infer current state for inaccessible repositories.

projects.name: AgentOps Runtime
projects.role: Execution infrastructure for governed agents, skills, approval gates, traces, evaluation, and evidence return.
projects.currentMilestone: NemoClaw local/staging integration is on main; the GTC review branch adds normalized sandbox, network, credential-reference, resource-budget, policy-version, and task-digest controls.
blockers: Production identity and authorization, hardened execution adapters, durable datastore and audit, immutable approval binding, staging enforcement evidence, live credentials, and paid execution remain blocked.

projects.name: Meta-Agent
projects.role: Portfolio intelligence, Chief of Staff planning, routing, approvals, registry, and weekly reporting.
projects.currentMilestone: The GTC portfolio review refreshes the connected repository matrix and defines a provider-neutral secure-runtime adoption order.
blockers: Current read-only GitHub discovery and automatic evidence freshness are not yet implemented; production side effects remain prohibited.

projects.name: VDS DesignOS
projects.role: Historical registry entry for an architecture studio operating system.
projects.currentMilestone: No current milestone may be asserted until direct repository evidence is available.
blockers: Repository is not available through the current GitHub connection; issue, pull-request, deployment, credential, billing, and production state are unverified.

projects.name: AURELEAN
projects.role: Textile intelligence, sourcing, RFQ, swatch, quote, and procurement MVP/prototype.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete hosted deployment evidence, production identity and RBAC, target database validation and cutover, tenant ownership, and observability while keeping AI integrations provider-neutral and disabled by default.
blockers: Hosted environment configuration, deployment and browser QA, durable database activation, confidential production controls, supplier awards, external messages, and live AI/provider activation require evidence and owner authorization.

projects.name: Meridian Yacht Atelier
projects.role: Client portal, design collaboration, publication controls, and cinematic connector platform.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete open Issue #5: pure cinematic domain core, provider-neutral ports, typed contracts, connector registry and routing policies, and deterministic fake agents and connectors.
blockers: Live provider execution, paid generation, production credentials, and any RTX Spark or Cosmos dependency remain outside the current approved scope.

projects.name: Monsieur App / Aelier Groupe Commerce Layer
projects.role: Historical registry entry for luxury commerce, made-to-measure, fibre passport, and private-client scope.
projects.currentMilestone: Confirm the canonical repository and connect it before defining executable work.
blockers: Repository is not available through the current GitHub connection; implementation, Stripe, credential, commerce, and production state are unverified.
